name: Red Classic Polo Shirt
description: Red short-sleeve polo shirt with a black contrast collar and sleeve trim. A clean smart-casual piece for everyday wear, events, and relaxed office styling.

name: Black Sport Casual Sneakers
description: Black lace-up casual sneakers with a white chunky sole and sporty everyday profile. Comfortable for walking, errands, school, and relaxed streetwear outfits.

name: Black Platform Loafers
description: Black slip-on platform loafers with a smooth faux-leather finish and chunky sole. A versatile footwear choice for clean casual and semi-formal dressing.

name: Black Lace-Up Combat Boots
description: Black lace-up combat boots with a chunky tread sole and stitched edge detail. A bold streetwear boot for casual styling and durable everyday outfits.

name: Beige Floral Comfort Sandals
description: Beige comfort sandals with floral bead detailing, soft footbed styling, and an easy slip-on strap design. Great for warm weather and casual daily wear.

name: Black Patent Dress Shoes
description: Glossy black lace-up dress shoes with a polished finish and white accent detail. A sharp footwear option for formal events, business looks, and special occasions.

name: Grey Orange Contrast Polo Shirt
description: Grey polo shirt with orange collar, sleeve trims, and placket detail. A bright smart-casual polo for relaxed weekends, office-casual looks, and events.

name: White Gold Contrast Polo Shirt
description: White short-sleeve polo shirt with gold collar and sleeve trim. A clean smart-casual top that pairs easily with jeans, chinos, or joggers.

name: Navy V-Neck Basic T-Shirt
description: Navy blue V-neck T-shirt with a simple clean finish. A lightweight everyday basic for layering, casual outfits, and minimal styling.

name: Color Splash Cartoon Graphic T-Shirt
description: Colorful all-over graphic T-shirt with a bold cartoon-inspired street art print. A loud statement piece for streetwear, casual outings, and standout looks.

name: Cream Oversized Signature T-Shirt
description: Cream oversized T-shirt with a premium signature-style chest print and sleeve detail. A soft streetwear-style piece for clean casual dressing.

name: Plain Grey Essential T-Shirt
description: Plain grey short-sleeve essential T-shirt with a simple clean look. A reliable everyday basic for layering or minimal casual outfits.

name: Classic Grey Sweatpants
description: Classic grey sweatpants with a soft casual look, drawstring waist, and relaxed leg fit. Easy to pair with T-shirts, hoodies, or sneakers.

name: Slim Grey Jogger Pants
description: Slim grey jogger pants with black drawstrings and a side zip pocket detail. A clean sporty option for casual and active-inspired outfits.

name: Grey Baggy Cargo Pants
description: Grey baggy cargo pants with roomy side pockets and adjustable ankle details. A trendy streetwear bottom for bold casual outfits.

name: Black Relaxed Jogger Pants
description: Black relaxed-fit jogger pants with an elastic waistband and drawstring. Comfortable for casual wear, errands, travel, and lounge styling.

name: Astronaut Space Graphic T-Shirt
description: Black T-shirt with a colorful astronaut and space-themed graphic print. A creative casual tee for standout streetwear looks.

name: Grey 24 Oversized Graphic T-Shirt
description: Grey oversized T-shirt with a large black 24-style front graphic. Designed for a relaxed streetwear fit and bold casual styling.

name: Orange Quote Graphic T-Shirt
description: Bright orange casual T-shirt with a bold decorative quote-style chest print. A clean statement tee for relaxed daily outfits.

name: Moonlit Lake Graphic T-Shirt
description: Black casual graphic T-shirt featuring a peaceful moonlit lake, mountain scenery, trees, and a small cabin print. A stylish relaxed piece for everyday streetwear.
